text.message: Helping red get to their second port on a strong OWS position is going to be rough

But you guys aren’t following other’s devs collections

Bro, we spend a time here expecting a fair game. Please dont waste my time

Because i wanted that sheep port. But that doesn’t mean i wanted you to loose
